entity.description: A lowing, a place near Jerusalem, mentioned only in Jer. 31:39.

nodes.description: A lowing, a place near Jerusalem, mentioned only in Jer. 31:39.

verses.text: And the measuring line shall yet go forth over against it upon the hill Gareb, and shall compass about to Goath.
